title: botrychium neolunaria
intro: Botrychium neolunaria, also known as the New Moon fern or New Moon grape fern, is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae, native to North America. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, primarily due to its saponin content, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Botrychium neolunaria include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as hypertension and urinary tract problems. Herbal preparations of the plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
